requirement_topic.en: IMDA EMC Technical Standards — Radiated and Conducted Emissions
requirement_topic.zh: IMDA电磁兼容技术标准——辐射及传导发射
requirement_topic.zht: IMDA電磁相容技術標準——輻射及傳導發射

summary.en: Wireless and IT equipment sold in Singapore must comply with IMDA EMC technical standards for radiated and conducted emissions. IMDA standards are aligned with ITU/ETSI/IEC international frameworks but are independently enforced. A CE Declaration of Conformity is not automatically accepted in lieu of Singapore compliance evidence. EMC compliance is assessed as part of IMDA equipment registration; test reports from IMDA-recognised or accredited laboratories are required.
summary.zh: 在新加坡销售的无线及信息技术设备须符合IMDA有关辐射及传导发射的电磁兼容技术标准。IMDA标准与ITU/ETSI/IEC国际框架接轨，但独立执行。CE符合性声明不能自动替代新加坡合规证据。电磁兼容合规作为IMDA设备注册的组成部分进行评审，须提供IMDA认可或经认可实验室出具的测试报告。
summary.zht: 在新加坡銷售的無線及資訊技術設備須符合IMDA有關輻射及傳導發射的電磁相容技術標準。IMDA標準與ITU/ETSI/IEC國際框架接軌，但獨立執行。CE符合性聲明不能自動替代新加坡合規證據。電磁相容合規作為IMDA設備登記的組成部分進行評審，須提供IMDA認可或經認可實驗室出具的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IMDA Technical Standards for Telecommunications Equipment
IEC/CISPR 32 (EMC for multimedia equipment, referenced by IMDA)

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 series (EMC for information technology equipment — radiated and conducted emissions) and SRRC radio type approval technical requirements covering RF emissions from intentional radiators. Test reports are produced by CNAS-accredited or SRRC-designated laboratories.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254系列标准（信息技术设备电磁兼容——辐射及传导发射）以及涵盖有意辐射体射频发射的SRRC型式核准技术要求。测试报告由CNAS认可或SRRC指定实验室出具。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254系列標準（資訊技術設備電磁相容——輻射及傳導發射）以及涵蓋有意輻射體射頻發射的SRRC型式核准技術要求。測試報告由CNAS認可或SRRC指定實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 (EMC — radiated and conducted emissions for ITE, China)
SRRC Radio Type Approval Technical Requirements (China)

gap.en: China's GB/T 9254 test reports and CE DoC are not automatically accepted by IMDA. Singapore requires evidence of EMC compliance aligned with IMDA technical standards as part of the equipment registration process. A fresh test report from an IMDA-recognised or accredited laboratory may be required even if equivalent international test data exists.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254测试报告及CE符合性声明不被IMDA自动接受。新加坡在设备注册过程中要求提供符合IMDA技术标准的电磁兼容合规证据。即便已存在等效国际测试数据，也可能需要提供IMDA认可或经认可实验室出具的新测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254測試報告及CE符合性聲明不被IMDA自動接受。新加坡在設備登記過程中要求提供符合IMDA技術標準的電磁相容合規證據。即便已存在等效國際測試數據，也可能需要提供IMDA認可或經認可實驗室出具的新測試報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IMDA EMC technical standards compliance is mandatory as part of equipment registration. CE DoC and Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not automatically substitutable. Exporters should confirm whether existing international test data (CISPR 32/IEC) is accepted by IMDA for the specific product category or whether fresh testing is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IMDA电磁兼容技术标准合规是设备注册的强制组成部分。CE符合性声明及中国GB/T 9254报告不能自动替代。出口商应确认现有国际测试数据（CISPR 32/IEC）是否被IMDA接受用于特定产品类别，或是否需要重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IMDA電磁相容技術標準合規是設備登記的強制組成部分。CE符合性聲明及中國GB/T 9254報告不能自動替代。出口商應確認現有國際測試數據（CISPR 32/IEC）是否被IMDA接受用於特定產品類別，或是否需要重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: IMDA EMC Labelling and Compliance Declaration
requirement_topic.zh: IMDA电磁兼容标注及合规声明
requirement_topic.zht: IMDA電磁相容標注及合規聲明

summary.en: Equipment registered with IMDA must bear the IMDA registration number on the product label and packaging as the primary compliance mark for Singapore. There is no separate EMC mark analogous to the European CE mark or Australian RCM mark in Singapore — the IMDA registration number serves as the unified compliance indicator covering radio, EMC, and telecom terminal requirements. Interference-protection conditions may be attached to individual equipment registrations.
summary.zh: 已向IMDA注册的设备须在产品标签及包装上标注IMDA注册号，作为新加坡的主要合规标志。新加坡不设类似欧洲CE标志或澳大利亚RCM标志的独立电磁兼容标识，IMDA注册号作为统一合规指示，涵盖无线电、电磁兼容及电信终端要求。单独的设备注册可能附有干扰防护条件。
summary.zht: 已向IMDA登記的設備須在產品標籤及包裝上標注IMDA登記號碼，作為新加坡的主要合規標誌。新加坡不設類似歐洲CE標誌或澳洲RCM標誌的獨立電磁相容標識，IMDA登記號碼作為統一合規指示，涵蓋無線電、電磁相容及電信終端要求。單獨的設備登記可能附有干擾防護條件。

standards_or_laws: IMDA Equipment Registration Framework — Labelling Requirements

summary.en: CCC mark on the product label for applicable categories (covers radio and EMC for CCC-scope equipment); SRRC type approval number displayed on the product for RF devices; MIIT NAL number on packaging for telecom terminal equipment sold in China.
summary.zh: 适用类别产品标签上的CCC标志（涵盖CCC范围内设备的无线电及电磁兼容要求）；射频设备产品上标注SRRC型式核准号；在中国销售的电信终端设备包装上标注工信部NAL进网许可证号。
summary.zht: 適用類別產品標籤上的CCC標誌（涵蓋CCC範圍內設備的無線電及電磁相容要求）；射頻設備產品上標注SRRC型式核准號；在中國銷售的電信終端設備包裝上標注工信部NAL進網許可號碼。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Type Approval Number Display Requirements (China)

gap.en: CCC mark, SRRC number, and MIIT NAL number are China-specific compliance marks with no legal effect in Singapore. The IMDA registration number is the required label for Singapore. Products must replace or supplement China-market labelling with the Singapore IMDA registration number before sale or import into Singapore.
gap.zh: CCC标志、SRRC号及工信部NAL号属于中国专属合规标识，在新加坡不具法律效力。新加坡要求标注IMDA注册号。产品在进口或于新加坡销售前，须在中国市场标注基础上增加或替换为新加坡IMDA注册号。
gap.zht: CCC標誌、SRRC號及工信部NAL號屬於中國專屬合規標識，在新加坡不具法律效力。新加坡要求標注IMDA登記號碼。產品在進口或於新加坡銷售前，須在中國市場標注基礎上增加或替換為新加坡IMDA登記號碼。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The IMDA registration number on the product label and packaging is the mandatory Singapore compliance mark for registered equipment, covering radio, EMC, and telecom terminal requirements. CCC, SRRC, and MIIT NAL marks have no substitution value under Singapore law.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品标签及包装上的IMDA注册号是已注册设备的新加坡强制合规标志，涵盖无线电、电磁兼容及电信终端要求。CCC、SRRC及工信部NAL标识在新加坡法律下无替代价值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品標籤及包裝上的IMDA登記號碼是已登記設備的新加坡強制合規標誌，涵蓋無線電、電磁相容及電信終端要求。CCC、SRRC及工信部NAL標識在新加坡法律下無替代價值。
